socialStructure.en: Each island was ruled by a Mencey (chief), followed by a noble class and priests; commoners engaged in herding and farming, with dependent laborers at the bottom. Islands were relatively independent, with social organization primitive but orderly.

rulingClass.zh: 门塞及贵族家族
rulingClass.en: Mencey and noble families

succession.zh: 门塞之位在贵族家族中传承，由长老会议确认
succession.en: The Mencey position was passed within noble families, confirmed by the council of elders

structure.zh: 各岛独立治理，每岛设门塞与长老议事会共同管理。不同岛屿间无统一政治组织。部落事务以口传习惯法与长老裁决为准。
structure.en: Each island was governed independently, with a Mencey and council of elders jointly managing affairs. There was no unified political organization between islands. Tribal affairs were governed by oral customary law and elder rulings.

function.zh: 辅佐门塞决策、审判纠纷、管理公共事务
function.en: Advised the Mencey on decisions, adjudicated disputes, and managed public affairs

function.zh: 主持宗教仪式、占卜与医疗，保管部落知识
function.en: Conducted religious ceremonies, divination, and healing, preserving tribal knowledge

laws.zh: 口传习惯法，强调畜产权保护与部族和平。偷盗牲畜为严重罪行，婚姻与继承由传统规范。长老议事会为最终仲裁者。
laws.en: Oral customary law, emphasizing livestock property protection and tribal peace. Livestock theft was a serious offense; marriage and inheritance were governed by tradition. The council of elders served as the final arbiter.

diplomacy.zh: 完全与外部世界隔绝，各岛屿之间也仅有有限的独木舟交流。自北非柏柏尔先祖迁入后，未与任何外部文明接触。
diplomacy.en: Completely isolated from the outside world, with only limited canoe contact between islands. Since their Berber ancestors arrived from North Africa, they had no contact with any external civilization.

religion.zh: 崇拜天神阿乔兰（Acoran/Achamán），祭祀太阳与山岳。以火山口与高山为神圣场所。有专职女祭司（哈里马关阿达）主持仪式。保留木乃伊葬俗。
religion.en: Worshipped the sky god Acoran/Achamán, with veneration of the sun and mountains. Volcanic craters and high peaks served as sacred sites. Dedicated priestesses (Harimaguadas) conducted ceremonies. Mummification burial customs were preserved.

traditions.zh: 石器时代的生活方式保存完好：石器工具、洞穴居住、口传史诗。独特的口哨语言（西尔波语）用于跨越峡谷通信。摔跤与牧棍比武为重要娱乐。
traditions.en: Stone Age lifestyle was well preserved: stone tools, cave dwelling, oral epics. A unique whistled language (Silbo) was used for cross-canyon communication. Wrestling and stick-fighting were important pastimes.

achievements.zh: 独特的口哨语言（西尔波语）为人类语言学奇迹，木乃伊制作技术在大西洋岛屿中独一无二，精美的陶器与岩画艺术。
achievements.en: The unique whistled language (Silbo) was a marvel of human linguistics, mummification techniques were unique among Atlantic island cultures, and fine pottery and rock art were notable achievements.

description.zh: 纯粹的新石器时代经济：以山羊与绵羊畜牧为主，辅以大麦种植与采集。没有金属工具，使用石器与骨器。没有航海能力，无法进行岛外贸易。经济完全自给自足。
description.en: A purely Neolithic economy: centered on goat and sheep herding, supplemented by barley cultivation and gathering. No metal tools, using stone and bone implements. No seafaring capability, unable to conduct external trade. Economy entirely self-sufficient.

description.zh: 停留在新石器时代技术水平：使用打制与磨制石器、骨器与木器。不掌握金属冶炼技术。陶器制作达到较高水平。缺乏造船与航海技术。
description.en: Remained at Neolithic technology levels: used chipped and polished stone tools, bone implements, and wooden tools. Did not possess metallurgical knowledge. Pottery was produced at a relatively high level. Lacked shipbuilding and navigation technology.

name.zh: 口哨通信语言（西尔波语）

description.zh: 所有成年男子为战士，使用石制标枪、木棍与投石器作战。无金属武器，无骑兵。战斗以部族间领地争端与牲畜劫掠为主要形式。
description.en: All adult males served as warriors, fighting with stone javelins, wooden clubs, and slings. No metal weapons or cavalry. Combat was primarily in the form of inter-tribal territorial disputes and livestock raiding.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 单刃直刀，三国/南北朝步骑通用
description.en: Single-edged straight saber, used by infantry and cavalry

description.zh: 复合弓或长弓，远射主力
description.en: Composite or longbow, primary ranged weapon

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以谷物仓储、金属储备和织物库存为主，储备水平约可维持0个月开支。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury was primarily grain granaries, metal reserves, and textile stocks, with reserves sufficient for about 0 months of spending.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政体系以实物税收和贡纳为基础，军事支出占据主导地位，国库储备以谷物、金属和织物为主。
fiscalPolicy.en: The fiscal system was based on in-kind taxation and tribute, military spending dominated, with treasury reserves held in grain, metals, and textiles.

name.zh: 塔斯马尼亚原住民社会

capital.zh: 无固定居所（季节性迁徙营地）

governmentForm.zh: 以小型游群为基本单位的平等主义部族社会，无集中化政治权力
governmentForm.en: An egalitarian tribal society based on small band units, with no centralized political authority

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等的狩猎采集社会。各部族由经验丰富的长老引导而非统治。性别分工明确但地位相对平等。约9个主要部族群体分布于塔斯马尼亚各地区。
socialStructure.en: A highly egalitarian hunter-gatherer society. Each tribe was guided rather than ruled by experienced elders. Gender roles were distinct but relatively equal in status. About 9 major tribal groups were distributed across Tasmania's regions.

rulingClass.zh: 无特权统治阶层，长老与有经验者引导决策
rulingClass.en: No privileged ruling class; elders and experienced individuals guided decisions

succession.zh: 自然形成的长老权威，基于年龄、经验与个人声望
succession.en: Naturally formed elder authority based on age, experience, and personal reputation

structure.zh: 无正式政府结构。约9个部族群体各自管理自己的领地，每个群体由若干游群（30-50人）组成。决策通过群体讨论达成共识。部族间定期集会交换信息与进行仪式。
structure.en: No formal government structure. Approximately 9 tribal groups each managed their own territory, with each group comprising several bands (30-50 people). Decisions were reached through group consensus discussions. Tribes periodically gathered to exchange information and conduct ceremonies.

function.zh: 引导群体讨论、协调迁徙路线与营地选址
function.en: Guided group discussions, coordinated migration routes and campsite selection

function.zh: 主持成人礼、季节仪式与部族间集会的宗教活动
function.en: Conducted initiation rites, seasonal ceremonies, and religious activities at inter-tribal gatherings

laws.zh: 口传习惯法与社会禁忌。领地界限受到尊重，越界需获许可。社会规范通过口传与集体惩罚（如流放）来维护。
laws.en: Oral customary law and social taboos. Territorial boundaries were respected; crossing them required permission. Social norms were maintained through oral tradition and collective punishment (such as banishment).

diplomacy.zh: 完全与外部世界隔绝。约8000年前海平面上升隔断了塔斯马尼亚与澳洲大陆的陆桥，此后未与任何外部群体接触。部族间保持和平交往与定期集会。
diplomacy.en: Completely isolated from the outside world. Rising sea levels severed the land bridge between Tasmania and mainland Australia approximately 8,000 years ago, after which there was no contact with any external group. Inter-tribal relations maintained peaceful interaction and periodic gatherings.

religion.zh: 万物有灵的信仰体系，认为自然界的一切均有精神存在。梦境时代（Dreamtime）的创世故事口耳相传。星象知识用于季节判断与导航。焚烧仪式具有宗教意义。
religion.en: Animistic belief system holding that all things in nature possessed spiritual essence. Dreamtime creation stories were passed down orally. Astronomical knowledge was used for seasonal reckoning and navigation. Fire ceremonies held religious significance.

traditions.zh: 世界上最古老的连续文化传统之一，延续数万年。精美的贝壳项链制作，赭石身体彩绘，岩画艺术。独特的火棒耕作（fire-stick farming）改变了岛屿生态。
traditions.en: One of the world's oldest continuous cultural traditions, spanning tens of thousands of years. Fine shell necklace crafting, ochre body painting, and rock art. Distinctive fire-stick farming shaped the island's ecology.

achievements.zh: 极端隔离条件下维持了数千年的可持续生活方式，独特的火棒生态管理技术，精美的贝壳工艺品，丰富的口传知识体系。
achievements.en: Maintained a sustainable lifestyle for thousands of years under extreme isolation, developed unique fire-stick ecological management, crafted fine shell artworks, and preserved a rich oral knowledge system.

description.zh: 纯粹的狩猎采集经济。沿海群体以海鲜（贝类、海豹）与海鸟蛋为主要蛋白来源，内陆群体狩猎袋鼠、负鼠等有袋动物。植物根茎与浆果为重要食物补充。无农业、无畜牧、无金属、无陶器。
description.en: A purely hunter-gatherer economy. Coastal groups relied on seafood (shellfish, seals) and seabird eggs as primary protein sources; inland groups hunted kangaroos, possums, and other marsupials. Plant roots and berries were important food supplements. No agriculture, animal husbandry, metallurgy, or pottery.

name.zh: 部族间季节性物资交换

description.zh: 旧石器时代晚期至中石器时代技术水平。使用石器、木制标枪与木棍。独特之处在于放弃了鱼钩与骨器技术（虽然祖先曾掌握）。火棒管理土地的技术在全球范围内独具特色。
description.en: Late Paleolithic to Mesolithic technology levels. Used stone tools, wooden spears, and clubs. Uniquely abandoned fishhook and bone tool technology (though ancestors had possessed them). Fire-stick land management was globally distinctive.

description.zh: 无专业军事组织。冲突以小规模部族间摩擦为主，使用木制标枪、木棍与石器作为武器。战斗通常为仪式化的有限冲突而非全面战争。
description.en: No specialized military organization. Conflicts consisted of small-scale inter-tribal friction, using wooden spears, clubs, and stone tools as weapons. Combat was typically ritualized limited conflict rather than total warfare.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 单刃直刀，三国/南北朝步骑通用
description.en: Single-edged straight saber, used by infantry and cavalry

description.zh: 步兵标准长兵器
description.en: Standard infantry polearm

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以谷物仓储、金属储备和织物库存为主，储备水平约可维持0个月开支。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury was primarily grain granaries, metal reserves, and textile stocks, with reserves sufficient for about 0 months of spending.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政体系以实物税收和贡纳为基础，军事支出占据主导地位，国库储备以谷物、金属和织物为主。
fiscalPolicy.en: The fiscal system was based on in-kind taxation and tribute, military spending dominated, with treasury reserves held in grain, metals, and textiles.

governmentForm.zh: 青藏高原东部的部落联盟
governmentForm.en: A tribal confederation on the eastern Tibetan Plateau

socialStructure.zh: 以部落和氏族为基本单元，高原畜牧为生计核心。
socialStructure.en: Organized by tribes and clans; highland pastoralism as core livelihood.

rulingClass.zh: 部落首领和战士贵族
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and warrior nobles

succession.zh: 首领推选制。
succession.en: Chiefs elected by consensus.

structure.zh: 松散的部落联盟，各部自治。
structure.en: Loose tribal confederation, each tribe autonomous.

function.zh: 协调部落间事务
function.en: Coordinated inter-tribal affairs

function.zh: 防御与劫掠
function.en: Defense and raiding

localAdmin.zh: 氏族长老自治。
localAdmin.en: Clan elders self-governed.

legalSystem.zh: 习惯法为主。
legalSystem.en: Customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 牲畜贡赋。
taxationSystem.en: Livestock tribute.

religion.zh: 羌族多神信仰
religion.en: Qiang polytheism

culturalAchievements.zh: 以游牧歌谣、石碉建筑和高原祭祀闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Known for pastoral songs, stone watchtowers, and highland rituals.

languageFamily.zh: 汉藏语系羌语支
languageFamily.en: Sino-Tibetan, Qiangic branch

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵论
philosophy.en: Animism

writingSystem.zh: 无文字。
writingSystem.en: No writing system.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 高原畜牧和粗放农业。
gdpDescription.en: Highland pastoralism and extensive farming.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、农业、纺织
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, farming, weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 牦牛、羊毛、药材
tradeGoods.en: Yaks, wool, medicinal herbs

householdWealth.zh: 以牲畜和牧场为核心。
householdWealth.en: Livestock and pastures as core wealth.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给型畜牧经济。
economicSystem.en: Self-sufficient pastoral economy.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以谷物仓储、金属储备和织物库存为主，储备水平约可维持6个月开支。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury was primarily grain granaries, metal reserves, and textile stocks, with reserves sufficient for about 6 months of spending.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政体系以实物税收和贡纳为基础，军事支出占据主导地位，国库储备以谷物、金属和织物为主。
fiscalPolicy.en: The fiscal system was based on in-kind taxation and tribute, military spending dominated, with treasury reserves held in grain, metals, and textiles.

populationDescription.zh: 约70万人。
populationDescription.en: About 700,000 people.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 单兵弩与床弩，中国军队核心远程武器
description.en: Infantry crossbow and mounted crossbow, core ranged weapon

description.zh: 步兵标准长兵器
description.en: Standard infantry polearm

description.zh: 复合弓或长弓，远射主力
description.en: Composite or longbow, primary ranged weapon

diplomaticStatus.zh: 曹魏和蜀汉竞相争取的边疆势力。
diplomaticStatus.en: A frontier force courted by both Cao Wei and Shu Han.

governmentForm.zh: 中亚半游牧王国
governmentForm.en: A Central Asian semi-nomadic kingdom

socialStructure.zh: 王族控制草场和贸易，游牧民与绿洲农民并存。
socialStructure.en: Royal family controlled pastures and trade; nomads and oasis farmers coexisted.

rulingClass.zh: 王族和游牧贵族
rulingClass.en: Royal family and nomadic aristocracy

succession.zh: 王族内传承。
succession.en: Passed within the royal family.

structure.zh: 国王统领，五小王分治。
structure.en: King led centrally; five lesser kings governed divisions.

function.zh: 外交与军事
function.en: Diplomacy and military

function.zh: 丝路管理
function.en: Silk Road management

localAdmin.zh: 五小国分治。

title.en: Cao Pi Usurps Han, Establishes Wei

description.zh: 曹操之子曹丕迫使汉献帝禅位，建立曹魏政权，定都洛阳。这标志着东汉王朝正式终结和三国时代的开始，曹魏继承了中国北方的大部分领土和人口。
description.en: Cao Cao's son Cao Pi forced Emperor Xian of Han to abdicate, establishing the Cao Wei regime with its capital at Luoyang. This marked the formal end of the Eastern Han dynasty and the beginning of the Three Kingdoms era, with Wei inheriting most of northern China's territory and population.

title.en: Liu Bei Proclaims the Shu Han Empire

description.zh: 刘备以汉室宗亲的身份在成都称帝，建立蜀汉政权，号称延续汉朝正统。蜀汉控制着益州（今四川盆地），虽然疆域最小但凭借天险地利维持了数十年的独立。
description.en: Liu Bei, claiming legitimacy as a Han imperial kinsman, proclaimed himself emperor in Chengdu, establishing the Shu Han regime as the continuation of Han orthodoxy. Shu Han controlled Yi Province (modern Sichuan Basin) and maintained independence for decades despite having the smallest territory, leveraging natural defensive terrain.

description.zh: 刘备为报关羽之仇东征孙吴，被吴将陆逊在夷陵以火攻大败。蜀军精锐损失惨重，刘备退至白帝城后不久病逝，将蜀汉国政托付给诸葛亮。
description.en: Liu Bei launched an eastern campaign against Sun Wu to avenge Guan Yu, but was catastrophically defeated by Wu general Lu Xun at Yiling through fire attacks. Shu's elite forces suffered devastating losses, and Liu Bei retreated to Baidi City where he soon died, entrusting Shu Han's governance to Zhuge Liang.

description.zh: 孙权正式称帝（229年），建立东吴政权，定都建业（今南京）。东吴控制着长江中下游和岭南地区，以强大的水军和发达的江南农业为立国之本。
description.en: Sun Quan formally proclaimed himself emperor (in 229 CE), establishing the Eastern Wu regime with its capital at Jianye (modern Nanjing). Eastern Wu controlled the middle-lower Yangtze and Lingnan regions, relying on a powerful navy and developed Jiangnan agriculture as the foundation of the state.

description.zh: 阿尔达希尔一世推翻帕提亚帝国末代国王，建立萨珊波斯帝国，定都泰西封。萨珊帝国复兴了琐罗亚斯德教为国教，迅速成为与罗马帝国对峙的西亚强权。
description.en: Ardashir I overthrew the last Parthian king and founded the Sasanian Persian Empire with its capital at Ctesiphon. The Sasanian Empire revived Zoroastrianism as the state religion and quickly became the dominant Western Asian power confronting the Roman Empire.

description.zh: 蜀汉丞相诸葛亮率军首次北伐曹魏，出祁山进攻陇西。虽然马谡在街亭之战中失守导致全军撤退，但诸葛亮随后进行了五次北伐，展现了蜀汉以攻为守的战略意图。
description.en: Shu Han Chancellor Zhuge Liang led his first Northern Expedition against Cao Wei, advancing through Qishan toward Longxi. Although Ma Su's loss at Jieting forced a full retreat, Zhuge Liang would launch five northern campaigns total, demonstrating Shu Han's strategy of offense as the best defense.

description.zh: 孙权于公元230年派遣卫温和诸葛直率万人船队远航夷洲（今台湾），这是中国大陆政权有史料记载的首次大规模台湾远征。此次航行虽因疾病等原因损失惨重，但开启了大陆与台湾的历史联系。
description.en: Sun Quan dispatched Wei Wen and Zhuge Zhi with a 10,000-man fleet to Yizhou (modern Taiwan) in 230 CE, the first documented large-scale expedition to Taiwan by a mainland Chinese regime. Though the voyage suffered heavy losses from disease, it established the historical connection between the mainland and Taiwan.

title.en: Roman Crisis of the Third Century Deepens

description.zh: 罗马皇帝亚历山大·塞维鲁被军队杀害（235年），开启了"军营皇帝"时代。此后五十年内罗马帝国经历了数十位皇帝的频繁更迭、内战、蛮族入侵和经济崩溃的多重危机。
description.en: Roman Emperor Alexander Severus was assassinated by his troops in 235 CE, inaugurating the era of "barracks emperors." Over the next fifty years, the Roman Empire endured dozens of emperors in rapid succession, civil wars, barbarian invasions, and economic collapse.

title.zh: 萨珊波斯入侵罗马东境

description.zh: 萨珊帝国国王沙普尔一世对罗马帝国东部行省发动大规模入侵，攻击叙利亚和美索不达米亚地区。波斯-罗马长期对抗成为3世纪西亚地缘政治的核心主题。
description.en: Sasanian king Shapur I launched massive invasions of the Roman Empire's eastern provinces, attacking Syria and Mesopotamia. The prolonged Persian-Roman confrontation became the central geopolitical theme of 3rd-century Western Asia.

description.zh: 蜀汉丞相诸葛亮在第五次北伐期间于五丈原病逝，年仅五十四岁。诸葛亮的去世标志着蜀汉进攻战略的终结，此后蜀汉逐渐转入防守态势，国力日益衰退。
description.en: Shu Han Chancellor Zhuge Liang died of illness at Wuzhangyuan during his fifth Northern Expedition, aged only fifty-four. His death marked the end of Shu Han's offensive strategy, after which the state gradually shifted to a defensive posture with declining national power.

description.zh: 日本邪马台国女王卑弥呼于公元238年遣使曹魏，获封"亲魏倭王"金印。这是日本与中国大陆政权之间最早有明确记载的外交往来之一，反映了东亚朝贡体系的早期形态。
description.en: Queen Himiko of Yamatai in Japan sent envoys to Cao Wei in 238 CE and was granted the gold seal title "Monarch of Wa, Friend of Wei." This is one of the earliest clearly documented diplomatic exchanges between Japan and a Chinese mainland regime, reflecting the early form of the East Asian tributary system.

description.zh: 东非的阿克苏姆王国在红海贸易中继续壮大，铸造金币银币，与罗马帝国和印度进行活跃的商业往来。阿克苏姆开始对南阿拉伯地区施加影响力，为后来征服希木叶尔奠定基础。
description.en: The Aksumite Kingdom of East Africa continued to grow through Red Sea trade, minting gold and silver coins and conducting active commerce with the Roman Empire and India. Aksum began exerting influence over southern Arabia, laying the groundwork for its later conquest of Himyar.

description.zh: 东吴政权大力开发长江中下游地区的农业和手工业，兴修水利，推广稻作。江南地区从此开始了从边陲到经济中心的转变，为后世"江南鱼米之乡"的格局奠定了基础。
description.en: The Eastern Wu regime vigorously developed agriculture and handicrafts in the middle-lower Yangtze region, constructing irrigation works and promoting rice cultivation. This initiated the transformation of the Jiangnan region from a frontier into an economic center, laying the foundation for its later reputation as "the land of fish and rice."

title.zh: 沙普尔一世俘虏罗马皇帝
title.en: Shapur I Captures Roman Emperor Valerian

description.zh: 萨珊帝国国王沙普尔一世在埃德萨战役（260年）中俘虏罗马皇帝瓦勒良，这是罗马历史上皇帝被外敌俘获的空前耻辱。沙普尔将此胜利刻在纳克什·鲁斯坦姆浮雕上永志纪念。
description.en: Sasanian king Shapur I captured Roman Emperor Valerian at the Battle of Edessa (260 CE), an unprecedented humiliation in Roman history. Shapur immortalized this victory in the rock relief at Naqsh-e Rostam.

description.zh: 叙利亚沙漠绿洲城市帕尔米拉在女王芝诺比亚的领导下趁罗马帝国衰弱之机独立，控制了叙利亚、埃及和安纳托利亚部分地区。帕尔米拉帝国虽然短暂，但展示了3世纪罗马分裂的严重程度。
description.en: The Syrian desert oasis city of Palmyra, under Queen Zenobia, exploited Roman weakness to achieve independence, controlling parts of Syria, Egypt, and Anatolia. Though short-lived, the Palmyrene Empire demonstrated the severity of 3rd-century Roman fragmentation.

description.zh: 曹魏大将邓艾偷渡阴平小道奇袭成都，后主刘禅投降，蜀汉灭亡。这是三国鼎立格局被打破的第一步，蜀汉立国四十二年。
description.en: Wei general Deng Ai took a daring route through the Yinping trail to surprise-attack Chengdu. Shu's last ruler Liu Shan surrendered, ending Shu Han after forty-two years. This was the first step in breaking the Three Kingdoms balance of power.

title.en: Sima Yan Usurps Wei, Founds Jin Dynasty

description.zh: 司马炎迫使魏元帝禅位，建立西晋王朝。司马氏历经三代人的经营，终于完成了从权臣到皇帝的转变，西晋继承了曹魏的北方领土并准备南征东吴以统一天下。
description.en: Sima Yan forced the last Wei emperor to abdicate, founding the Western Jin dynasty. The Sima family, after three generations of maneuvering, completed the transition from powerful ministers to emperors. Western Jin inherited Wei's northern territories and prepared to conquer Eastern Wu for reunification.

description.zh: 玛雅低地的蒂卡尔、卡拉克穆尔等城邦在3世纪进入快速发展期，修筑大型金字塔和仪式中心，发展出精密的天文历法和象形文字系统。玛雅古典文明的基础在这一时期奠定。
description.en: Maya lowland city-states such as Tikal and Calakmul entered a period of rapid growth in the 3rd century, constructing large pyramids and ceremonial centers while developing sophisticated astronomical calendars and hieroglyphic writing. The foundations of Classic Maya civilization were laid during this period.

title.zh: 罗马皇帝奥勒良统一帝国
title.en: Emperor Aurelian Reunifies the Roman Empire

description.zh: 罗马皇帝奥勒良先后击败帕尔米拉帝国和高卢帝国，在短短五年内重新统一了分裂的罗马帝国。他在罗马城修筑了奥勒良城墙以抵御蛮族入侵，并获得"世界恢复者"的称号。
description.en: Roman Emperor Aurelian successively defeated the Palmyrene and Gallic Empires, reunifying the fragmented Roman Empire within five years. He constructed the Aurelian Walls around Rome against barbarian threats and earned the title "Restorer of the World."

description.zh: 鲜卑拓跋部在北方草原逐渐崛起，建立了以盛乐（今内蒙古和林格尔）为中心的部落联盟。拓跋鲜卑的壮大预示着他们将在五胡乱华时期建立北魏王朝，主导中国北方政局。
description.en: The Tuoba Xianbei gradually rose on the northern steppe, establishing a tribal confederation centered on Shengle (modern Horinger, Inner Mongolia). The Tuoba's growing power foreshadowed their establishment of the Northern Wei dynasty during the Sixteen Kingdoms period, dominating northern Chinese politics.

title.en: Western Jin Conquers Wu, Reunifies China

description.zh: 西晋大军从长江上游顺流而下，攻灭东吴政权，孙皓投降。中国在经历近百年的分裂后重归统一，但西晋的统一局面仅维持了短短三十余年。
description.en: Western Jin armies swept downstream along the Yangtze, conquering Eastern Wu as its last ruler Sun Hao surrendered. China was reunified after nearly a century of division, though Jin's unified rule would last only about thirty years.
